item.title: That would explain a lot of things.
item.description: The worst part is she's right on every point.
item.dc:creator: Pentjotal

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
Trying to do more daily dirty posts dis week to catch up on my over 3k memes I have piled up to share. enjoy!
well fudge didnt I just post dis one too. so many duplicates. that is why I do these posts tho before sorting into deviousness folder.
purdy.
yes I can.
om, I dont feel this is true anymore. Thank you Pookie :p
I have so many tshirts. all of the tshirts.
only 40%?
cuddled into bed for naps always a good time.
very important safety glasses.
om.
that and one other thing.
I miss rain.
sometimes you do wanna just be held and loved and stuffs. cuddles are always good.
I didnt. and now I am making some great friendships to remember there is better then lousy lovers in this world.
playing with my rubber duckies. and shit.
hate this shit. like just say what you want and mean and dont play fucking games. too old for that shit.
I am amazing and everyones problem now.
but its sunday so this is my exact plans. kind of. weekends are for doing dis I thought?
mhmm.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We had a super successful little secret santa! Thank you to everyone who participated. I learned a lot and look forward to doing it next year! We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
Thanks to everyone who continues to follow my posts even when I disappear randomly for a bit. I am going to keep making dis series for a bit. This is how many memes I sort through to pick the deviousness ones out. Feel free to hit the follow button as I wont be doing a ping list for this series. Deviousness posts will now be on fridays and will contain the sorted memes still. "I want to dance always, to be good and not evil, and when it is all over not to have the feeling that I might have done better." - Ruth St. Denis I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe

item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: If you're having a bad day, here's an assortment wholesome dump to make you smile : )
item.description:
1. That's how you have fun
2. Chunky boyyy
3. Doggos acting like drunk buddies at a bar
4. Piggy getting combed
5. Bunny making its bunny bed
6. Them eyebrows
7
8
9. This game looks fun
10. Getting a shower
11. Cow zoomies
12. Horsie zoomies
13. Here we have a tree logging machine having breakfeast in its natural habitat
14. Otter having its temperature taken : )
15 Thank you if you made this far in the dump! Let me share with you that as well as posting on Imgur, I'm also working on a game of my own. A passion project, if you will. It's a "Stanley Parable" inspired first person narrative game. If you like the vibe of this dump, you might actually like the game to (at least what my friend on Discord tells me, that one friend). Anyway please wishlist it helps small game devs like me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a great week!!

item.title: The Owl
item.description:
Nearly every species of raptor is dying of rodenticide poisoning. But there is a better way: Stop using rat poison.
These are the 7 species of owl found in southeast Wisconsin: Snowy Owl, Great Horned Owl, Barred Owl, Short-eared Owl, Long-eared Owl, Screech Owl, and the Saw-whet Owl.
Here's how to prevent rodent visitors without ecosystem-destructive poisons: https://intobirds.com/ditch-the-rat-poison-use-prevention/
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.dc:creator: percusser

item.title: Fry's Electronics was fucking rad
item.description:
Founded in 1985, Fry's was a consumer electronics superstore. Costco but for nerds.
For no reason, absolutely no reason at all, each location was HEAVILY themed, like Disneyland Ride level themed. No two themes could be alike
At their peak, there were 34 locations in 9 U.S. states.
I like this one armed bandit
This was my local Fry's, I wasted many a happy hour there
This one with a runaway train is a favorite
A closer view
Not just the outside was themed, the indoor areas were also subject to the whimsy.
Indoors theming of the space ship crash location was delightful
I never went to this one but holy crap
Alice in Wonderland theme (see the cards floating away)
The theme in miniature
They expanded to sell appliances later in their lifecycle
Eventually Amazon & Covid were a 1-2 punch that even a fun retail experience with heavily loyal customers like Fry's couldn't withstand, and in 2021 they closed.
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: Clear my camera roll & zone out with me
item.description:
Gpoy
I know a grandma named Kimberly and yes, what the hell
I’d go to that sludge show
Kill me fast I guess
It’s me charming myself almost every time
Apex twin videos predicted this
Hey, bud. Bet you still look at my posts. Idk why I always come when you call either.
Wazzaaaaaap
Duck tax
Dog tax. My sweet tiny bb pittie is 15/105 now and got a sweater printed with her photo at her birthday party.
